name: Ryan Hu
headline: I work on LLM agents, reinforcement learning, evaluation, and practical systems for thinking with models.
bio: This site is my academic homepage and public knowledge base. I use Obsidian for private thinking, then publish the notes that are worth sharing.
My current interests include LLM agents, computer-use agents, reinforcement learning, evaluation, and tools for maintaining long-lived knowledge.

news.text: Launched this academic homepage and public wiki.

projects.title: Personal Wiki
projects.description: An Obsidian-first knowledge base published as a lightweight static site.
